name: Lady Zhen

skills.name: Frozen Touch
skills.description: Places marks on enemies when hitting them with skills, for up to 3 stacks. Upon reaching max stacks, she freezes and damages the enemy.

skills.name: Ocean of Tears
skills.description: Damages and launches enemies within the target area

skills.name: Flowing Sigh
skills.description: Fires a water orb at the target, which deals damage and bounces between nearby enemies.

skills.name: Destructive Deluge
skills.description: Fires a stream of water in the target direction. For a period of time after hitting an enemy hero or reaching its maximum range, the stream of water reforms into a pool, dealing damage and slowing enemies within it.

tips: Lady Zhen (Mage): Tier A on international ranked — 51.37% WR.
Build core: Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Venomous Staff.

patchHistory.change: Camp HOK — WR 51.37%, pick 1.02%, ban 0.05%, popularity tier A.
Counters Cirrus, Nakoruru, Sima Yi · Weak into Charlotte, Liu Bei, Luna.

faqs.question: Is Lady Zhen good in current season?
faqs.answer: Lady Zhen is Tier A Mage with 51.37% win rate, 1.02% pick rate, and 0.05% ban rate on the international server (Camp HOK).

faqs.question: What is the best Lady Zhen build?
faqs.answer: Recommended item path: Boots of Tranquility, Holy Grail, Venomous Staff, Scepter of Reverberation, Augur's Word, Breakthrough Robe. Spells and Arcana are listed on this page.

faqs.question: How to counter Lady Zhen?
faqs.answer: Strong picks into Lady Zhen: Charlotte, Liu Bei, Luna. Lady Zhen is strong into Cirrus, Nakoruru, Sima Yi.

metaAnalysis: Counters: Cirrus, Nakoruru, Sima Yi. Countered by: Charlotte, Liu Bei, Luna.
